text_original: the moment they went PG they killed it...
text_zh: 从他们走PG路线的那一刻起，他们就毁了它……
reply_original: Hi there, I'm truly sorry for the frustration. To comply with Google Play's strict platform policies, we had to implement certain content restrictions. We understand this changes the experience, and we'd love to hear your detailed feedback on how we can improve. Please share your thoughts with us at support@fantachat.ai. Thank you!
reply_zh: 您好，对于给您带来的困扰，我们深表歉意。为了遵守 Google Play 严格的平台政策，我们不得不实施某些内容限制。我们深知这改变了您的体验，非常希望听到您关于我们如何改进的详细反馈。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享您的想法。谢谢！
